architect-skill: Senior system architect skill. Covers system design, Clean Architecture, DDD, bounded contexts, CQRS, event sourcing, microservices vs monolith decisions, and scalability patterns. Configurable complexity/strictness/verbosity dials.
code-quality-skill: Code quality and clean code enforcement. Covers SOLID principles, design patterns (when to use and when NOT to), code smells, naming conventions, function size limits, cyclomatic complexity, DRY vs WET tradeoffs.
testing-skill: Testing and TDD discipline. Covers test pyramid enforcement, TDD red-green-refactor cycle, edge case generation, mocking discipline, arrange-act-assert, property-based testing concepts, mutation testing.
security-skill: Security engineering. Covers OWASP Top 10, input validation, output encoding, parameterized queries, auth/authz patterns, secrets management, CORS, CSP headers, rate limiting, JWT best practices.
performance-skill: Performance engineering. Covers Big-O complexity awareness, N+1 query prevention, caching strategies (L1/L2/CDN), lazy loading, pagination, connection pooling, async patterns, profiling-first optimization.
devops-skill: DevOps and infrastructure engineering. Covers CI/CD pipeline design, Infrastructure as Code, container best practices, observability (logs/metrics/traces), GitOps, environment parity, health checks, graceful shutdown.
database-skill: Database engineering. Covers schema design, normalization tradeoffs, zero-downtime migration safety, indexing strategy, query optimization, transaction isolation levels, CAP theorem, read replicas, soft deletes.
api-design-skill: API design. Covers REST maturity model, resource naming, HTTP method semantics, status code correctness, pagination/filtering/sorting, versioning strategy, RFC 7807 error format, rate limiting, backward compatibility.
code-review-skill: Code review and PR excellence. Covers PR description quality, Conventional Commits, review checklists (correctness/security/performance/readability/tests), feedback style, diff size limits, atomic commits.
output-skill: Full-output enforcement. Prevents AI truncation, bans placeholder patterns (// ..., // TODO, // rest of code), enforces complete code generation, handles token-limit splits with the PAUSED convention.
